title: Savory German Salmon Bake
description: A garlicky, light one-pot German-style salmon bake that is halal-friendly and packs fresh dill and yogurt flavors.
instructions: Preheat oven to 190°C (375°F) and lightly grease a 9x9 inch baking dish with olive oil.
Whisk together Greek yogurt, Dijon mustard, minced garlic, lemon juice, chopped dill, salt, pepper, and capers until smooth.
Arrange smoked salmon fillets in the baking dish in a single layer.
Spoon the yogurt mixture evenly over the salmon fillets, ensuring they are fully coated.
Bake uncovered for 12 minutes or until the salmon flakes easily and the yogurt topping is set.
Remove from oven and let rest 3 minutes before serving.
Garnish with freshly chopped parsley and a drizzle of olive oil.
Serve warm as a light lunch or dinner.
